questions.question: Explain the difference between a primary key constraint and a not null constraint, and provide an example of how to add these constraints to the employee table in SQL.
questions.hint: Consider the structure of the employee table and the role of each constraint

questions.question: Write the SQL command to add a primary key constraint to the 'employee_id' column of the employee table, and explain the purpose of this constraint.
Modify the employee table to include a not null constraint on the 'department_id' column, and explain the implication of this constraint.
questions.hint: Use the ALTER TABLE statement with the NOT NULL keyword
